mapper.sql: a.id, a.applicant_id, a.classroom_id, a.apply_date, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.purpose, a.attendee_count, a.contact_phone, a.attachments, a.status, a.remark, a.created_at, a.updated_at, a.is_deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT ,
FROM yx_classroom_application a LEFT JOIN yx_user u ON a.applicant_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = FALSE LEFT JOIN yx_classroom c ON a.classroom_id = c.id AND c.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE yx_classroom_application SET classroom_id = #{classroomId}, apply_date = #{applyDate}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, purpose = #{purpose}, attendee_count = #{attendeeCount}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, attachments = #{attachments}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE yx_classroom_application SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE yx_classroom_application SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
